meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve overwhelmed by AI tools (Intermediate Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome overwhelmed by AI tools. A Intermediate-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: overwhelmed by AI tools

content.seo_title: Antigravity Project Template: Master AI-Driven Freelancing
content.seo_description: Overwhelmed by AI tools? Use this Antigravity project template to streamline your workflow. An intermediate guide for freelancers using Claude Code.
content.answer_block: Stop chasing every new AI tool. The Antigravity project template centralizes your stack, using Claude Code to automate boilerplate and architectural scaffolding. By standardizing your environment, you cut development time by 60%, allowing you to ship production-ready SaaS apps for clients in hours, not weeks.
content.intro:
The modern freelancer's desktop is a graveyard of abandoned AI tools, half-finished scripts, and fragmented context windows. You’re drowning in noise, switching between LLMs, and losing your edge while trying to manage the very tech designed to save you time.

It’s time to stop building from scratch. The Antigravity project template acts as your architectural anchor, integrating seamlessly with Claude Code to turn your natural language intent into high-fidelity, maintainable codebases. Reclaim your focus and command your workflow with a system built for speed and professional scale.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish a standardized project structure that separates concerns and optimizes for AI context injection.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a professional SaaS boilerplate with clean architecture, separated service layers, and a unified environment configuration.

steps.title: Contextualize the Domain Model
steps.description: Define your database schema and business logic constraints to ensure the AI generates type-safe code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the provided requirements and generate a schema.prisma file and corresponding TypeScript interfaces for a multi-tenant SaaS application.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "generate schema.prisma based on the project requirements"

steps.title: Implement Modular Service Layers
steps.description: Use Claude Code to create decoupled service modules that prevent code bloat and improve testability.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a modular service layer for user authentication and subscription management, following the repository pattern defined in the template.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "create auth service with repository pattern"

steps.title: Automate Endpoint Generation
steps.description: Rapidly build out your API surface area while maintaining strict security and validation standards.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold secure REST endpoints for the defined services, including Zod validation and comprehensive error handling.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "scaffold endpoints for auth and billing with Zod validation"

steps.title: Continuous Integration Refinement
steps.description: Use Claude Code to audit the codebase for performance bottlenecks and security vulnerabilities before deployment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the current project for security vulnerabilities and suggest refactors to improve server-side performance.

pro_tips: Use a .claudeignore file to prevent the AI from indexing massive node_modules or build artifacts, drastically increasing context quality.
Always define your 'Design System' in a separate context file so Claude Code maintains visual consistency across all generated components.
Chain your prompts: ask the AI to write the test suite before the implementation to ensure TDD compliance.
Leverage Claude Code's 'review' feature to force a self-critique of the code output before finalizing the commit.
Keep your Antigravity template updated by pinning specific versions of your core dependencies to avoid breaking changes in AI-generated scaffolding.
content.next_steps: After completing this template setup, deploy your base version to Vercel and begin iterating on client-specific feature requests using the same modular patterns.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting the tools and start mastering the architecture. You have the blueprint, the CLI, and the strategy. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
